HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which entity type is best for my business?
faqs.a: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest company to register?
faqs.a: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

faqs.q: Can NRIs register a company in India?
faqs.a: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

faqs.q: Do you provide company registration in Amritsar?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Amritsar, Punjab. Holy City — textile and food processing hub. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Amritsar?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Amritsar clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with company registration in Amritsar?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Amritsar businesses with no location surcharges.
